description: Phase 41: QuantGov - Governance & Democracy Package. Create packages/governance/ with DAO-style voting, proposal system, community moderation juries, appeals process, platform constitution, algorithmic auditing, and open data/transparency reports.
steps: Create packages/governance/package.json with deps: @quant/common, @quant/auth, @quant/moderation, zod. Create packages/governance/tsconfig.json extending root.
Create packages/governance/src/types.ts - Type definitions for Proposal, Vote, DAO, GovernanceToken, Jury, Appeal, Constitution, AuditReport, TransparencyReport, CommunityRule
Create packages/governance/src/core/voting.ts - VotingSystem class: createProposal, castVote, tallyVotes, getResults, delegateVote, revokeVote, getVotingPower, closeVoting, getQuorum
Create packages/governance/src/core/dao.ts - DAOManager class: createDAO, joinDAO, leaveDAO, getMembers, distributeTokens, getTokenBalance, proposeAction, executeAction, getTreasury

Create packages/governance/src/core/community-moderation.ts - CommunityModeration class: selectJury, assignCase, submitVerdict, appealDecision, getJuryPool, getCaseHistory, getModeratorStats, trainModerator
Create packages/governance/src/core/constitution.ts - ConstitutionService class: getRights, getResponsibilities, amendConstitution, proposeAmendment, ratifyAmendment, checkCompliance, getHistory

Create packages/governance/src/core/algorithmic-audit.ts - AlgorithmicAuditor class: auditAlgorithm, getAuditReport, detectBias, measureFairness, generateExplanation, getTransparencyReport, scheduleAudit
Create packages/governance/src/core/open-data.ts - OpenDataService class: getAPIUsageStats, getModerationStats, getFinancialReport, getContentStats, getAlgorithmStats, exportData, getPublicDashboard
Create packages/governance/src/__tests__/voting.test.ts - Tests for proposal creation, voting, tallying, quorum
Create packages/governance/src/__tests__/community-moderation.test.ts - Tests for jury selection, case assignment, appeals
Create packages/governance/src/__tests__/algorithmic-audit.test.ts - Tests for bias detection, fairness metrics, reporting
acceptance_criteria: packages/governance/ directory exists with proper package.json and tsconfig.json
VotingSystem handles proposals with quorum-based decision making
DAOManager manages decentralized organizations with token governance
CommunityModeration provides jury-based content moderation with appeals
ConstitutionService codifies platform rules with amendment process
AlgorithmicAuditor detects bias and generates transparency reports
All classes have comprehensive TypeScript types
Unit tests pass for voting, moderation, and auditing
pnpm typecheck passes for the package
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && npx vitest run packages/governance/src/__tests__/ --passWithNoTests
